query:
SELECT us.skill_id
          FROM user_skills us
          WHERE us.user_id = $1 AND us.enabled = true
            AND us.skill_id NOT IN (
                SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(entity_id, entity_name) FROM session_entity_links
                WHERE user_id = $1 AND entity_type = 'skill'
            )
          ORDER BY us.skill_id ASC
